title: visual_findings.v1
description: visual_findings.v1 — FP-030 base + FP-032 honesty fields (source, confidence, discriminated) + FP-035-prep collaborative-panel fields (material_light axis, design_patterns_observed). All FP-032/panel fields are OPTIONAL so findings written before the hardening still validate. No additionalProperties:false anywhere: the runner enriches the top level with aggregation keys (oracle_verdict, final_verdict, known_warnings_carried, ...).

source.description: Where this judgment came from. oracle_bridge is the legacy/normalizer default kept for back-compat with findings written before the source enum split.

discriminated.description: Did the emitting backend prove it discriminates this defect-type in the last negative_dogfood? null = not measured.

design_pattern.description: One observed reusable design pattern from the collaborative 3-judge panel's synthesis stage (FP-035-prep — accumulates knowledge for a future RAG; never a fidelity verdict). Empty design_patterns_observed[] is honest when there is not enough signal; never fabricate an entry.

pattern.description: Short label of the design choice observed, e.g. 'paleta black_wood_gold em cozinha compacta'.

design_patterns_observed.description: FP-035-prep: structured, reusable design knowledge synthesized by the 3rd (synthesis) judge from the panel's two reports. Absent or [] is honest when there is insufficient data — never fabricated. This is observational knowledge, NOT a fidelity or aesthetic verdict (human_verdict/IMPROVED-SAME-WORSE stay exclusive to Felipe).
